learningObjectives.title: Understand Enterprise Resource Planning
learningObjectives.description: Explain the purpose and importance of ERP systems.

learningObjectives.title: Explain SAP
learningObjectives.description: Describe SAP and its role as an ERP solution.

learningObjectives.title: Understand SAP S/4HANA
learningObjectives.description: Explain why SAP S/4HANA is the next-generation ERP platform.

learningObjectives.title: Identify Core SAP Modules
learningObjectives.description: Recognize major SAP functional modules and their purpose.

learningObjectives.title: Understand Business Process Integration
learningObjectives.description: Explain how ERP integrates enterprise departments.

businessBackground.title: Why ERP Exists
businessBackground.problem: Organizations traditionally managed Sales, Procurement, Finance, Warehouse, and Logistics using independent systems. This caused duplicate data, manual communication, delayed reporting, and operational inefficiencies.
businessBackground.solution: ERP centralizes business processes into one integrated system with a shared database.

businessScenario.problem: Sales receives a large customer order while inventory, warehouse, procurement and transportation operate independently.
businessScenario.solution: SAP ERP integrates every department so information automatically flows from Sales to Inventory, Procurement, Warehouse, Transportation and Finance.
businessScenario.businessBenefit: Faster order fulfillment, lower transportation cost and higher customer satisfaction.

sections.content: Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) is an integrated business management system that connects multiple departments through a centralized database. Instead of each department maintaining separate systems, ERP provides a single source of truth for all business operations.

sections.title: Remember
sections.content: ERP is a business concept. SAP is one of the software companies that provides ERP solutions.

revisionSummary: SAP is an ERP software provider.
Transportation Management is part of the integrated ERP landscape.
